greeting: ^Mira: I made it down here ahead of you. Barely. The spiders are everywhere.
^Mira: Found a relatively safe corner — as safe as anything gets in a shadow-infested warren.
^Mira: Did you find any Glowing Mushrooms? Three is what I need. They only grow in the deep sections.
mushroom_reward: ^Mira: Oh, you found them! All three! Perfect specimens.
^Mira: These are Lunafungi — extremely rare. I can brew Sanctum Amulets with the residue.
^Mira: Here. Take this. It will help against whatever is down there.
^Mira: And I restocked my supplies. Take what you need — on the house this time.
